description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) made by Salmūn b. Qūrīl (=Cyril), apparently a Coptic civil servant (al-[...] fī l-dīwān). Includes a description of his physical appearance (as is usual for iqrārs). On verso there is Hebrew poetry. Needs examination for content. (Information in part from Baker & Polliack catalogue)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
